data.name: OpenTrackedBrowserDescription
data.value: Open the app in a tracked browser session and stream browser logs to this resource.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserDescription
data.value: Choose the browser, profile, user data mode, and scope used by tracked browser sessions.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserPromptMessage
data.value: Choose tracked browser settings. Resource-specific settings override global BrowserLogs settings.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserBrowserDescription
data.value: Choose an installed Chromium-based browser or enter an executable path.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserProfileDescription
data.value: Choose a Chromium profile from the Aspire-managed browser hive, or enter a profile directory/name.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserProfileOptionWithDisplayName
data.comment: {0} is the Chromium profile directory name, {1} is the Chromium profile display name

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserUserDataModeRequired
data.value: User data mode must be Shared or Isolated.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserProfileRequiresShared
data.value: Profiles can only be selected when user data mode is Shared.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserSaveToUserSecretsDescriptionConfigured
data.value: Save these settings to [user secrets](https://aka.ms/aspire/user-secrets) so future AppHost runs use them.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserSaveToUserSecretsDescriptionNotConfigured
data.value: User secrets are not configured for this AppHost, so settings can only apply to this running AppHost.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserInteractionUnavailable
data.value: Tracked browser settings cannot be configured because dashboard interactions are not available.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserUserSecretsUnavailable
data.value: Tracked browser settings cannot be saved because the AppHost does not have user secrets configured.

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserApplied
data.comment: {0} is the resource name or scope that the settings apply to

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserSaved
data.comment: {0} is the resource name or scope that the settings apply to

data.name: ConfigureTrackedBrowserSaveFailed
data.value: Tracked browser settings could not be saved to user secrets for key '{0}'.
data.comment: {0} is the user secrets configuration key

data.name: CaptureScreenshotDescription
data.value: Capture a screenshot from the active tracked browser session and save it as a PNG artifact.

data.name: InspectBrowserDescription
data.value: Return a JSON snapshot of the active tracked browser page, including URL, title, visible text, and actionable elements with selectors.

data.name: NavigateBrowserDescription
data.value: Navigate the active tracked browser page to an absolute URL.

data.name: ClickBrowserDescription
data.value: Click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: FillBrowserDescription
data.value: Fill an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: FocusBrowserElementDescription
data.value: Focus an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: TypeBrowserTextDescription
data.value: Type text into an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: PressBrowserKeyDescription
data.value: Press a key on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.

data.name: HoverBrowserElementDescription
data.value: Move the pointer over an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

data.name: SelectBrowserOptionDescription
data.value: Select an option in a browser select element by option value or visible text.

data.name: ScrollBrowserDescription
data.value: Scroll the active tracked browser page or a selected scrollable element.

data.name: WaitForBrowserDescription
data.value: Wait until a selector is visible, text appears on the page, or both conditions are met.

data.name: WaitForBrowserUrlDescription
data.value: Wait until the active tracked browser page URL matches the expected value.

data.name: WaitForBrowserUrlSucceeded
data.value: Browser URL wait condition was met.

data.name: WaitForBrowserLoadStateDescription
data.value: Wait until the active tracked browser page reaches a load state.

data.name: WaitForBrowserLoadStateSucceeded
data.value: Browser load state wait condition was met.

data.name: WaitForBrowserElementStateDescription
data.value: Wait until a selected element reaches a state such as visible, hidden, enabled, disabled, checked, or unchecked.

data.name: WaitForBrowserElementStateSucceeded
data.value: Browser element state wait condition was met.

data.name: CloseTrackedBrowserDescription
data.value: Close the active tracked browser page for this resource.

data.name: SelectorArgumentDescription
data.value: CSS selector for the target element. Use selectors returned by Inspect browser page when possible.

data.name: ValueArgumentDescription
data.value: Text value to assign to the target field.

data.name: TypeTextArgumentDescription
data.value: Text to type into the target element.

data.name: SelectValueArgumentDescription
data.value: Option value or visible option text to select.

data.name: KeyArgumentDescription
data.value: Keyboard key to press, such as Enter, Escape, Tab, or a single character.

data.name: TextArgumentDescription
data.value: Visible page text to wait for.

data.name: DeltaYArgumentDescription
data.value: Vertical scroll distance in CSS pixels. Positive values scroll down and negative values scroll up.

data.name: DeltaXArgumentDescription
data.value: Horizontal scroll distance in CSS pixels. Positive values scroll right and negative values scroll left.

data.name: WaitUrlArgumentDescription
data.value: URL value to wait for. It can be a full URL, URL fragment, or regular expression depending on the match mode.

data.name: MatchArgumentDescription
data.value: How the current browser URL should be compared with the URL argument.

data.name: LoadStateArgumentDescription
data.value: Page load state to wait for: domcontentloaded, load, or networkidle.

data.name: ElementStateArgumentDescription
data.value: Element state to wait for: attached, detached, visible, hidden, enabled, disabled, checked, or unchecked.

data.name: TimeoutMillisecondsArgumentDescription
data.value: Maximum time to wait before the browser command fails.

data.name: MaxElementsArgumentDescription
data.value: Maximum number of actionable elements to include in the page snapshot.

data.name: MaxTextLengthArgumentDescription
data.value: Maximum number of visible page text characters to include in the page snapshot.
